chunks.text: Student Award: Chair's Graduate Award | EECS at UC Berkeley Chair's Graduate Award This is an award for the student leaders who worked on the Visit Days. Awardees 2024-2025 Vivek Bharadwaj, Eli Bronstein, Cassidy Laidlaw, Sara Pohland, Rahul Shah 2023-2024 Shm Almeda, Lydia Ignatova, Cassidy Laidlaw, Jade Pinkenburg, Sara Pohland, Sowmya Thanvantri, Titan Yuan 2022-2023 Shm Almeda, Lydia Lee, Yifan You 2021-2022 Shm Almeda, Saavan Patel 2020-2021 Jasmine Jan, Federico Mora, Saavan Patel, Justin Wong 2019-2020 Kevin Laeufer, Kristina Monakhova 2018-2019 Benjamin Brock, Laura Hallock, Forrest Laine 2017-2018 Nicholas Hynes, Forrest Laine, Nathan Pemberton
